hypothesis: If concept-based steering vectors derived from a Concept Bottleneck Model applied to frozen LLM activations are used during generation, then the LLM will produce molecules whose target properties (e.g., QED, LogP) are more accurately matched (lower MAE and Best100MAE) while maintaining high validity, novelty, uniqueness, generative efficiency, and synthetic accessibility compared to vanilla, ActAdd, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning baselines across in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings.
